title: [lichen_l2.c:1473-1700] lichen_l2_input: pkt not unreffed if net_pkt_write succeeds but later fails
description:
Contract violation: error handling - memory leak impossible but code structure confusing

**Issue:** Looking at the code flow:
1. pkt allocated at line 1654
2. net_pkt_write at line 1672
3. If write fails (line 1673), unref and return (line 1675-1676)
4. Unlock mutex (line 1680)
5. net_recv_data at line 1691
6. If recv fails, unref (line 1694)

**Assessment:** Actually the code is correct. All error paths properly unref the packet:
- Write failure: lines 1674-1676
- recv_data failure: lines 1693-1695

**No fix needed** - error handling is correct, ownership is properly managed.
